name: Onion-Tomato Cheese Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Thinly sliced spring onions (1 lb)
2 and 1/2 cups Shredded low-fat Swiss cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine onion and margarine in a 2-quart glass measure or casserole.
2. Cover with vented plastic wrap or lid. Microwave on high for 5 to 6 minutes.
3. Remove onion with a slotted spoon and place it in the bottom of the pie shell.
4. Stir flour into cheese and sprinkle over the top of the onion.
5. Place tomatoes on top of the cheese.
6. To the remaining liquid in the measure, add milk, eggs, and Italian seasoning; beat well.
7. Pour the milk mixture over the ingredients in the pie shell.
8. Rotate midway through cooking, microwave on medium-high (70%) for 10-12 minutes, or until the center is almost set.
9. Let stand 10 minutes before cutting.
